title: Mideast Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks With Few Signs of De-escalation
summary_full: President Trump and Iran’s Revolutionary Guards exchanged threats and U.S. allies in the Gulf said they had intercepted Iranian drones, as hostilities entered a fourth day.
summary_public: President Trump and Iran’s Revolutionary Guards exchanged threats and U.S. allies in the Gulf said they had intercepted Iranian drones, as hostilities entered a fourth day.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. and Iran Trade Attacks With Few Signs of De-escalation
